subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, Who hast made manifest in Thy days that which lay concealed in the breasts of the treacherous among Thy servants and the slanderers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا من اظهرت فی ایامک خافیه صدور الخائنین من عبادک و المفترین من
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
